title: Add Contact Us page, Gallery with admin photo upload, and updated Services list

requirements.text: Create a Contact Us page displaying the company's email address, phone number, and physical location/address. The page should be accessible from the main navigation and styled consistently with the existing site theme.

quotes: Contact Us page (with your email, phone, location)

acceptanceCriteria: A Contact Us page is accessible via navigation
The page displays email, phone number, and location/address
The page is styled consistently with the rest of the site
The page is reachable from the bottom navigation or header

requirements.text: Add a route and backend endpoint for the Contact Us page data (email, phone, location) so admins can manage contact details. Store contact info in the backend and expose a public read endpoint.

quotes: Contact Us page (with your email, phone, location)

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores contact details (email, phone, address)
A public query function returns current contact details
An admin-only update function allows changing contact details

requirements.text: Update the Project Gallery page to allow admin users to upload new photos directly from the gallery page. The upload button must only be visible to authenticated admin users. Non-admin users continue to browse gallery photos as before.
acceptanceCriteria: An 'Upload Photo' button is visible only to authenticated admins on the gallery page
Admins can select and upload an image file which then appears in the gallery
Non-admin users do not see the upload button
Upload progress is shown during photo upload
Newly uploaded photos appear in the gallery without a full page reload

requirements.text: Update the Services page to reflect the current and correct list of services offered by Nellore Print Hub. Ensure all four service categories (Digital Printing, Flex & Banner, Offset Printing, Creative Design) are accurately described with relevant features and call-to-action buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: Services page lists all relevant service categories with accurate descriptions
Each service card includes a title, description, feature list, and a call-to-action button
The page is styled consistently with the site theme

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
Admin-only features must be protected by AdminGuard or equivalent admin auth checks
nonGoals: Any features beyond Contact Us page, Gallery photo upload, and Services list update
